should_trigger.prompt: Analyze the module boundaries in this Rails app
Check for boundary violations between packages
Map the dependency graph between modules
Help me with rb boundaries patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Trace a request through the stack
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Our Packwerk packages have circular dependencies — help me untangle them
After fixing the bug, also check if rb boundaries needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Trace the call stack from controller to database
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
